phone_presence_notes: Consistently warm and natural — used 'man' and 'of course man' in a way that felt genuine, and the customer responded openly and positively throughout.
top_strength: Best clock section in the batch — explicitly covered 2.5hr minimum, 15-min prorate, on-site start with signature, and no warehouse-to-door charge, all in one clean pricing summary.
coaching_note: No agenda opener and no real Save Your Ass are the two key misses. On a move this small (partial bedroom, ~$535–700), the consolidation speech is especially impactful — Landon had a natural opening when the customer mentioned taking boxes himself. Also needs to use the customer's name more than once; 'AJ' was said once at the top and never again.
